selection_policy.history_policy: only select contracts whose OKX listTime age is at least min_history_age_days
selection_policy.noncrypto_policy: include live OKX instCategory 3/4 above min_noncrypto_turnover and min history
selection_policy.crypto_policy: fill remaining slots with long-history liquid instCategory 1 contracts
selection_policy.note: OKX currently has fewer than 200 long-history stock/ETF/commodity swaps, so long-history crypto fills the remainder.
